response.original_title: How much does it cost to close my Wells Fargo account? [Claim→Your→Start]
response.overview: Evaluating Standard Closure Fees Knowing the exact (+1) 877-513-6142 | USA cost of closing a bank account can save you from unexpected surprises. Generally, Wells Fargo does not charge a specific "exit fee" if the account has been open for a significant period. However, calling (+1) 877-513-6142 | USA is recommended to check if your specific account type has an "Early Account Closure" penalty. Typically, if you (+1) 877-513-6142 | USA close an account within 90 to 180 days of opening it, there might be a fee ranging from $25 to $50. To get the most accurate and up-to-date fee schedule, talking to an agent at (+1) 877-513-6142 | USA will clarify if your account age exempts you from these costs.
